changeReason: English translation was missing; ENG field contained untranslated Japanese text.

TextENGNew: ``Let's see,@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3012. ...'This is a deck of cursed playing cards.@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3013. If you use these cards to utterly crush a younger girl in a game, you and your descendants will be cursed for the next eight centuries.@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3014. To avoid this curse, the best course of action is to relinquish your victory, no matter how spectacular, and instead worship the younger girl--specifically the one with shorter hair--as the true champion.@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3015. Do this, and you and your family and descendants shall enjoy a blessed fate for all eternity.'@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3016. --Or so it says.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``My, my~?@k@vS20/04/VTT_satoko3002. What a pity for you, Keiichi-san!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``What a shame that you must forfeit such a rare and resounding victory!@k@vS20/04/VTT_satoko3004. ...Well, I would hate for you to suffer a curse, so reluctantly, I shall graciously accept your victo--``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``--Eeeek?!@k@vS20/04/VTT_satoko3006. Wh-What do you think you're doing?!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Look, Satoko.@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3018. The fact that you thought I'd actually believe this note hidden on the back of the card box is what shocks me!@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3019. Has Satoko's wellspring of traps finally run dry?!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``I-I didn't plant it!@k@vS20/04/VTT_satoko3008. Do you honestly think I would set such a pathetic trap?!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...This happened right after our game of Rich Man, Poor Man ended.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: It all started when Mion, about to put the cards away after our fierce battle, noticed something written on the back of the card box and said 'Huh?'
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The text was handwritten in remarkably neat penmanship. ...Given that, there was no need to ask who the prime suspect was.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Who else but you would write a message that so blatantly secures your own benefit?!@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3021. Come on, confess, Satoko!@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3022. If you fess up now, I'll let you off with just one gross of forehead flicks!!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...A gross? How many is that?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``One gross is twelve dozen, so that comes to exactly one hundred forty-four flicks.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Hau, Rika-chan knows everything~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Y-You can't be serious!!@k@vS20/04/VTT_satoko3010. Getting flicked in the forehead over a hundred times is bad enough, but being punished for a crime I didn't commit is absolutely unacceptable--!!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Satoko denied it with her face flushed crimson, looking genuinely offended. ...Her reaction was so intense that even I, who had assumed it was her usual excuse-making, paused and asked her again.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...You really didn't do it, Satoko?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``That is what I have been saying!!@k@vS20/04/VTT_satoko3012. I truly, genuinely did not do this!!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``You really, truly, honestly didn't?@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3025. Can you swear it on the gods, on the Buddha, and on me?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...That last one is terribly suspicious and I resent it,@k@vS20/04/VTT_satoko3014. ...but fine, I shall swear it.@k@vS20/04/VTT_satoko3015. This was not my doing.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``She's right.@k@vS20/02/VTT_rena3018. For Satoko-chan, this trap is way too sloppy. Even Rena thinks so.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Now that you mention it, you're right.@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3020. ...But if it wasn't her, then who?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Mii.@k@vS20/05/VTT_rika3003. This deck of cards was brand new until Mii opened the seal.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Yeah...@k@vS20/02/VTT_rena3020. Rena clearly saw Mii-chan tear off the plastic wrap right in front of us.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...If that was the case, then who on earth...?
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: We all racked our brains, but... in the end, the mystery remained unsolved.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: It had to be someone in the club, almost certainly... but hmm~~.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
